gist.headline: Secret Handshakes
gist.blurb: Updated our internal secret keys for Replicate in production and staging. Just keeping the gears turning smoothly behind the scenes!
gist.summary: Updated the encrypted Replicate API tokens in the production and staging SOPS secrets to replace placeholder values.
gist.impact: Ensures the text generation gateway can properly authenticate with Replicate in staging and production environments.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about secrets, keys, and backend infrastructure (Replicate API tokens). Visuals: Polly the bee holding a glowing key or securing a locked chest, with the Monitor Robot helping secure a server.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot holding a glowing golden key next to a chunky retro server rack. A small robot with a CRT monitor head gives a thumbs up. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
